channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: NPS Clarifies That Central Police Station OCS Is Not Facing Court Arraignment
item.description: The National Police Service has come out clearly to dismiss social media rumours claiming that the Officer Commanding Station at Nairobi's Central Police Station was about to be arraigned in court. Ch...

item.title: Election watchdogs appeal Comelec ruling on alleged prohibited campaign donations by Marcos and Duterte
item.description: Election watchdog group Kontra Daya, together with other sectoral organizations, has filed an appeal against the Commission on Elections (Comelec) ruling regarding alleged prohibited campaign contribu...

item.title: Portraits Highlighting Edwardian Women’s Fashion and Social Grace
item.description: The Edwardian Era, spanning the early 1900s, was a period marked by elegance, sophistication, and a new sense of feminine grace. This era is often remembered for the iconic “S-bend” silhouette and the...

item.title: Rising Costs of Essentials Put Pressure on South African Households Despite Economic Stability
item.description: South Africa has managed to maintain macroeconomic stability, but ordinary households are feeling the pinch as prices of essential items such as food, transport, and electricity continue to rise. The ...

item.title: Rio Ferdinand warmly received during Tanzania visit
item.description: Former England football captain Rio Ferdinand recently visited Tanzania, where he received a very warm and heroic welcome from fans and locals alike. His visit coincided with several sporting and cult...

item.title: Tanzania Urges Africa to Process Minerals Locally to Boost Jobs and Economy
item.description: Tanzania Deputy Minister for Minerals, Steven Kiruswa, is calling on African countries to stop just exporting raw minerals and instead focus on processing and manufacturing them locally. He emphasised...

item.title: A showcase of Cathy Wilcox's recent political cartoons
item.description: Cathy Wilcox, a renowned Australian cartoonist, continues to capture the nation's attention with her latest series of illustrations. Her work often reflects political and social commentary, using humo...

item.title: Punjab CM launches pilot underground electricity wiring project in Satoj village
item.description: In a significant step towards modernising rural infrastructure, Punjab Chief Minister Bhagwant Mann inaugurated a pilot underground electricity wiring project in his native Satoj village. The initiati...

item.title: ACT Wazalendo appoints shadow cabinet with Mpina as deputy prime minister
item.description: Dar es Salaam – ACT Wazalendo, one of Tanzania’s opposition parties, has announced its new shadow cabinet, bringing in 25 leaders including Luhaga Mpina as Deputy Prime Minister. This is Mpina’s first...

item.title: Tanzania boosts border and health measures amid regional Ebola concerns
item.description: Tanzania government has intensified health preparedness in response to the rising Ebola outbreak in the East African region. Health Minister Mohamed Mchengerwa confirmed that border posts and regional...

item.title: Supreme Court Closes Pandemic-Era Suo Motu Cases
item.description: On Tuesday, the Supreme Court of India decided to close four separate suo motu cases which were initiated during the Covid-19 pandemic. These cases had addressed several urgent matters including the t...

item.title: U.K. Authorities Investigate Historical Child Abuse Allegations Linked to Jeffrey Epstein
item.description: Police in Surrey, a county just southwest of London, are investigating two separate allegations of historical child sexual abuse following documents from the U.S. Justice Department related to the con...

item.title: 25,000-Year-Old Paleolithic Engraving of a Woman Discovered in Cussac Cave, France
item.description: Archaeologists have discovered a 25,000-year-old Paleolithic engraving of a woman deep within Cussac Cave in the Dordogne region of southwestern France. Known as a 'Venus' figure, the engraving is par...

item.title: San Diego mosque shooting investigated as hate crime after suspects were already being tracked by police
item.description: Before a deadly shooting at the Islamic Center of San Diego, police were already searching for two teenagers, aged 17 and 18, after one was reported missing and suicidal by his mother. The search inte...

item.title: US Highlights Risks of China-Dominated Supply Chains as Pax Silica Initiative Launches in PH
item.description: US Undersecretary for Economic Affairs Jacob Helberg visited New Clark City on May 18, 2026, to support the Pax Silica initiative, an industrial hub planned under a US-led effort to diversify supply c...

item.title: Delhi-NCR sees Stage 1 pollution control measures as air quality dips to poor
item.description: The Commission for Air Quality Management (CAQM) has activated Stage 1 restrictions under the Graded Response Action Plan (GRAP) for Delhi and the surrounding National Capital Region after the Air Qua...

item.title: Fortress Acquires Majority Stake in Balfour Mall for Comprehensive Redevelopment
item.description: Balfour Mall, a well-known 37,000 sqm retail centre in Highlands North, Johannesburg, is set for a significant redevelopment after Fortress Real Estate Investments Limited acquired a 51% controlling s...

item.title: Kylie Minogue and Family Celebrate Netflix Documentary Launch in London
item.description: Aussie pop icon Kylie Minogue attended the London launch of her new Netflix documentary, ‘Kylie’, accompanied by her sister Dannii Minogue and former Neighbours co-star Jason Donovan. The documentary ...

item.title: How to Benefit from Rising Interest Rates by Smart Saving and Investing
item.description: My people, when interest rates dey rise, plenty folks feel the heat because loan repayments for house, car or personal debts go up. This one tight your budget well well, especially for lower-income ho...

item.title: Davido criticizes Oyetola over alleged political strategy in Osun 2026
item.description: Political heat don dey rise for Osun State as popular Nigerian singer Davido come out publicly drag Minister of Marine and Blue Economy, Adegboyega Oyetola. For one post on X (wey used to be Twitter) ...
